summary: Completed testing of onboarding flow feature. Backend: 9/9 tests passed - all onboarding API endpoints working correctly (GET /api/user/onboarding-status, POST /api/user/complete-onboarding, POST /api/user/reset-onboarding). Frontend: Code review verified OnboardingModal has 5 steps with proper content, navigation, progress bar, and all required data-testid attributes. Fixed a BUG in api.js where .get() and .post() methods were missing.
passed_tests: GET /api/user/onboarding-status - returns onboarding_completed boolean with auth
POST /api/user/complete-onboarding - returns success and sets onboarding_completed: true
POST /api/user/complete-onboarding - persists state in MongoDB profiles collection
POST /api/user/reset-onboarding - returns success and sets onboarding_completed: false
POST /api/user/reset-onboarding - persists state in MongoDB profiles collection
Full onboarding flow (reset -> check -> complete -> check) works end-to-end
OnboardingModal component has 5 steps with proper content (Welcome, Daily Winners, Watchlist, Stores, Reports)
OnboardingModal has all required data-testid attributes
OnboardingModal step navigation logic implemented correctly
useOnboarding hook correctly checks onboarding status
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: api.js was missing .get() and .post() methods that OnboardingModal and useOnboarding were calling - added wrapper methods that provide axios-like interface
OnboardingModal properly prevents closing via ESC key or clicking outside (onPointerDownOutside and onEscapeKeyDown handlers)
OnboardingModal correctly calls /api/user/complete-onboarding on skip, completing last step, or action button click
useOnboarding hook correctly manages state and checks profile.onboarding_completed flag
All 5 onboarding steps have unique colors (indigo, amber, purple, emerald, rose) and icons as specified

success_rate.frontend: 100% (code review verified - UI testing limited due to Supabase auth requirement)

test_credentials: Demo token: demo_test_onboarding_user_123 (used for backend API testing)
seed_data_creation: Test profile created for user 'test_onboarding_user_123' in profiles collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding feature fully implemented. Backend uses demo token auth (demo_<user_id>) when SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET is not set. Frontend requires Supabase auth for full UI testing. OnboardingModal shows on Dashboard for users where profile.onboarding_completed is false/undefined. The api.js module now has axios-like .get()/.post()/.put()/.delete() wrapper methods.
